##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customFile/list 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customFile/list 
 ## 接口描述 
获取自定义档案列表，分页接口，一次最多查询100条 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileName","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":false,"label":"%E5%81%9C%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E5%85%B3%E9%97%AD%EF%BC%8C1-%E5%BC%80%E5%90%AF","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100%E6%9D%A1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%AA%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"10","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100%E6%9D%A1"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"100","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":false,"label":"%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%AA%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"10","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderBy","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%92%E5%BA%8F%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"globalSearch","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%B3%E9%94%AE%E5%AD%97%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"createTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"ele 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/api/v1/customFile/list
### 请求示例

```

    "customFileId": "adafas1234",
    "customFileName": "1231daasd12413",
    "status": "1",

}

                "limit": 0,

                        "optionId": "string",
                        "optionIdList": [

                        ],
                        "optionLevel": 0,
                        "optionName": "string",
                        "parentName": "string",
                        "parentSeqId": 0,
                        "serialNumber": 1,
                        "status": "1",
                        "seqId": 0
                    }
                ],
                "seqId": 0,
                "start": 10,
                "status": "string",
                "updateTime": 0
            }
        ],

    }
}

```

| ---------- | ------------ | -------- |
| 200        | 成功         | 无      |
